one_time_description: Additional government funding (non-recurring) of $5,820,633 received in 2024 with no budget amount
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in multiple partnerships including Kakina Economic Development Group, Niiwin Wendaanimok Construction LP, Shoal Lake #40 Camp Services LP, Shoal Lake #40 Consulting Services LP, Shoal Lake #40 Contractor Services LP, Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership. 60-year water quality preservation agreement with Province of Manitoba and City of Winnipeg. Under construction: pumphouse, several new houses, and a daycare.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unidentified Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280. Nation is located in both Ontario and Manitoba. Consolidated entity includes CMHC Housing. Large deferred revenue balance of $16.5M at year end vs $2.9M prior year (significant increase). Province of Manitoba accounts payable of $7,747,710 unchanged from prior year - unusual. Additional government funding of $5,820,633 with no budget - likely non-recurring. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet is $75,036,394 which includes remeasurement gains of $342,015; the statement of operations shows accumulated surplus of $74,694,379. Multiple related party partnerships not fully consolidated. Annual debt service represents repayments only; new ISC flood claim loan of $93,777 advanced in year.
